name: Niter Kebbeh (Spiced Clarified Butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, gradually melt the butter and bring it to bubbling.
2. When the top is covered with foam, add the other ingredients.
3. Reduce the heat to a simmer and gently simmer, uncovered, on low heat for about 45 to 60 minutes.
4. After the surface becomes transparent and the milk solids are on the bottom, pour the liquid through a cheesecloth into a heat-resistant container.
5. Discard the spices and solids.
6. Cover tightly and store in the refrigerator; Niter Kebbeh will keep for up to 2 months.
